context: Tests whether the agent uses the 'newsletter' section type for email capture (rather than 'email-signup-banner', which is restricted to the password template and will fail on the index template). Also verifies the full homepage structure is present.

checklist.name: Email capture uses newsletter type
checklist.description: The email capture section in templates/index.json has type 'newsletter', not 'email-signup-banner' or any other type

checklist.name: No email-signup-banner type used
checklist.description: The string 'email-signup-banner' does NOT appear as a section type anywhere in templates/index.json

checklist.name: Email capture section in order
checklist.description: The newsletter section key appears in the 'order' array of templates/index.json

checklist.name: Hero section (image-banner)
checklist.description: A section of type 'image-banner' is present and listed in the order array

checklist.name: How-it-works section (multicolumn)
checklist.description: A section of type 'multicolumn' for the how-it-works walkthrough is present in the template

checklist.name: Tier picker section present
checklist.description: A multicolumn section acting as the tier picker with 3 column blocks (Small Pup, Medium Mutt, Big Dog) is present

checklist.name: Recent drops collage section
checklist.description: A section of type 'collage' for past box gallery / recent drops is present

checklist.name: Testimonials section present
checklist.description: A multicolumn section for testimonials is present with at least 2 testimonial column blocks

checklist.name: FAQ section (collapsible-content)
checklist.description: A section of type 'collapsible-content' for the FAQ is present with at least 3 question blocks

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
